zh.lifeSummary: Rebecca Lynn Eyre於1588年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 高威可隆福特。她於1612年與Thomas Tooley在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1678年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德紐波特紐波特享年90歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Rebecca Lynn Eyre于1588年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 高威可隆福特。她于1612年与Thomas Tooley在英国英格兰林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1678年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德紐波特紐波特享年90岁。

nameMeanings.name: Eyre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: This name was that of a historically prominent family in Galway (Ireland) since the 1650s.

variants.name: Ayer
meanings: English and Scottish: from Middle English eir, eyr ‘heir’ (Anglo-Norman French heyr, Old French (h)eir, Latin heres). Forms such as Richard le Heyer were frequent in Middle English, denoting a man who was well known to be the heir to the main property in a particular locality, either one who had already inherited or one with great expectations.
English: from the Anglo-Norman French and Middle English personal name Aier (ancient Germanic Agihari).

nameMeanings.name: Rebecca
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, from the Latin form of the Hebrew name Rebekah, borne by the wife of Isaac, who was the mother of Esau and Jacob (Genesis 24–27). The Hebrew root occurs in the Bible only in the vocabulary word marbek ‘cattle stall’, and its connection with the name is doubtful. In any case, Rebecca was Aramean, and the name probably has a source in Aramaic. It has always been common as a Jewish name; in England and elsewhere it began to be used also by Christians from the 14th century onwards and especially at the time of the Reformation, when Old Testament names became popular. It was very common among the Puritans in the 17th century, and has enjoyed a tremendous vogue in England since the latter part of the 20th century, among people of many different creeds. In Scotland this is found as an Anglicized form of Beathag .

nameMeanings.name: Lynn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain origin: possibly an altered short form of Linda , or a derivative of the French name Line, which originated as a short form of various girls' names ending in this syllable, for example Caroline. The element -lyn(n) has been a productive suffix of English girls' names since at least the middle of the 20th century, Lynn itself having enjoyed considerable popularity in the 1950s and 60s, especially.

variants.name: Lynne
meanings: Of uncertain origin: possibly an altered short form of Linda , or a derivative of the French name Line, which originated as a short form of various girls' names ending in this syllable, for example Caroline. The element -lyn(n) has been a productive suffix of English girls' names since at least the middle of the 20th century, Lynn itself having enjoyed considerable popularity in the 1950s and 60s, especially.

en.lifeSummary: Rebecca Lynn Eyre was born in 1588, in Clonfert, County Galway, Ireland. She married Thomas Tooley in 1612, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1678, in Newport, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, at the age of 90.

Elle est décédée en 1678, à Newport, Newport, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 90 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Rebecca Lynn Eyre(은)는 1588년 아일랜드 카운티 갈웨이 클론퍼트에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1612년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 Thomas Tooley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1678년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 뉴포트 뉴포트에서 90세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Rebecca Lynn Eyre родилась в 1588 г. в местности клонфирт, коунти галвеи, Ирландия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Tooley в 1612 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1678 г. в местности нюпорт, нюпорт, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 90 лет.
